name: Fruit-Filled Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 400°F (High-altitude: 425°F). Grease bottom of 12 medium muffin cups, or line with paper baking cups.
2. Stir milk, oil and egg in a bowl until blended. Add Bisquick Baking Mix and sugar, stirring just until moistened.
3. Divide batter evenly among muffin cups. Drop 1 level teaspoon fruit preserves onto center of batter in each cup. Bake 13-18 minutes or until golden brown. Cool slightly; remove from pan. Drizzle with glaze.
GLAZE
Stir powdered sugar and water in a small bowl until smooth.
